fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKColorspacePrimariesCicp` is an enumeration of CICP (Coding-Independent Code Points) color primaries as defined in ITU-T H.273. These values identify the set of color primaries used to define the chromaticity of the colors in a color space.

Use the values of this enumeration together with <xref:SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp> when calling <xref:SkiaSharp.SKColorSpace.CreateCicp(SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp,SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp)> to construct a standard color space.

## Examples

```csharp
// Create an HDR color space using Rec. 2020 primaries and PQ transfer function
var colorSpace = SKColorSpace.CreateCicp(
    SKColorspacePrimariesCicp.Rec2020,
    SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp.Pq);

if (colorSpace != null)
{
    // Use the color space with an SKImageInfo
    var info = new SKImageInfo(800, 600, SKColorType.Rgba8888, SKAlphaType.Premul, colorSpace);
}
```
]]></format>
fields.summary: Specifies CICP color primaries as defined in ITU-T H.273.
Color primaries corresponding to ITU-T H.273 value 22.
ITU-R BT.2020 color primaries for ultra-high-definition television.
ITU-R BT.470 System B/G color primaries.
ITU-R BT.470 System M color primaries.
ITU-R BT.601 color primaries for standard-definition television.
ITU-R BT.709 color primaries for high-definition television.
SMPTE ST 428-1 color primaries (D-Cinema Distribution Master).
An unknown or unspecified set of color primaries.
